binary_decision: normal iff four-class argmax is normal; otherwise abnormal
claim: published-model / verified-server-checkpoint / ICBHI-test-selected / zero-target-tuning exploratory transfer
preprocessing: author SG-SCL 16 kHz mono, full-recording fade, event crop, 8 s repeat/truncate, 128-bin fbank, resize 798x128

source.license: no LICENSE in author repository; redistribution requires review

target_constraints.device_metadata: not consumed by author validation predictive path; no target device mapping invented
target_constraints.target_labels: joined only after all logits for final scoring
